A greater booster shot is a collection of psychotechnologies which addresses a [[triad]] of plagues rather than an individual plague. Each is a group of three [[booster shots]] which together form the [[Ninefold vaccine]][[Category:Ninefold vaccine]]
[[sn:Greater booster shots]]# [[Sacredness]]
# [[Meta-attention]]
# [[Gnosis]]

[[Category:Greater booster shots]]
==See Also==
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
